title: Report plans with iba a
subtitle: Say what someone was going to do.
overview: Iba a + infinitive reports a plan in the past.
It is very useful for explaining changes.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I was going to go out, but it rained.
We were going to eat together.
Ana was going to call me.

items.es: Iba a estudiar, pero tuve que trabajar.
items.en: I was going to study, but I had to work.

items.es: Íbamos a viajar en tren, pero no había billetes.
items.en: We were going to travel by train, but there were no tickets.

items.es: Ana iba a venir, pero se sintió mal.
items.en: Ana was going to come, but she felt sick.

items.es: Iba a comprar esa camisa, pero era demasiado cara.
items.en: I was going to buy that shirt, but it was too expensive.
What were you going to say?
